signals.headline: Wrapped XRP Goes Live on Solana | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Wrapped XRP Goes Live on Solana | YES | MED confidence**  
Wrapped XRP launched on Solana, enhancing cross-chain utility amid Solana's price pop past $90 (despite a 0.8% 24h dip to $89.27).[1][3] This could impact Solana-related Polymarket bets (e.g., April price targets), though less directly tied to broad price surges.[4]
